Sound Familiar?

Most leaders I talk to are stuck in the same place. Here's what they tell me:

😵‍💫

Overwhelmed by Options

"There are 1000 AI tools. I don't know which ones matter for my business."

📊

Board Pressure

"My board keeps asking about our AI strategy. I need answers, not more questions."

⏰

Moving Too Slow

"My competitors are using AI. We're still talking about it. I need to move fast."

💸

Wasted Budget

"We bought AI tools but nobody's using them. I need ROI, not experiments."

Still Have Questions?

"What if we're just starting with AI?"

Perfect. Most of my clients are exactly where you are. The Strategy Sprint is designed to take you from zero to clear roadmap — regardless of your current AI maturity.

"How is this different from big-4 consulting?"

Big-4 firms give you a 200-page deck and leave. I give you a roadmap and stay to help you execute. Plus, I've actually built AI products — they haven't.

"What industries do you work with?"

I've worked across tech, healthcare, finance, manufacturing, and retail. The principles are the same — the applications are what change.

"What if my team doesn't have AI skills?"

That's exactly why you need a strategy first. I'll help you identify build vs. buy decisions and create a talent plan that fits your budget.

Your AI Strategy Won't Build Itself

Every day you wait is a day your competitors pull ahead. Book your free call now and let's map your path to AI leadership.
